summary_en: Specific metrics and targets not disclosed in excerpt. Company evaluated current state and determined improvement policies and initiatives regarding capital-cost-conscious and stock-price-conscious management, decided by Board on 29 May 2026.
title_en: Notice on Responses Toward Realizing Capital-Cost-Conscious and Stock-Price-Conscious Management
translation_en_brief: On 29 May 2026, Taoka Chemical Company held a Board meeting to evaluate and analyze its current state regarding capital-cost-conscious and stock-price-conscious management. The Board resolved specific policies and initiatives aimed at improving performance in this area. The disclosure indicates that detailed metrics, targets, and implementation plans are provided in the full document (pages following the cover page). The company signals a formal commitment to aligning its operations and capital allocation with cost-of-capital discipline and shareholder value creation through stock price appreciation.
